Jack Mackerel SAM Results

This page collects rendered SAM diagnostics now owned by the JM_sam repository. The active report should be updated here; the retained JM_SCW_prep/sam render is a frozen migration artifact from an earlier commit.

Results

Result Source Link
Active JM_sam diagnostics JM_sam repository Open report
Frozen JM_SCW_prep SAM diagnostics JM_SCW_prep/sam, commit f5a21f0 Open retained report

Notes

  • JM_sam is the canonical repository for the SAM workflow and active report.
  • The JM_SCW_prep/sam report is copied into scw_prep_f5a21f0/ only to retain the earlier rendered result for provenance.
  • New SAM changes should be made in JM_sam, not in JM_SCW_prep/sam.
